title: Arctic (and Antarctic!) Sea Ice Extent: December 21, 2023
summary: December 21 2023: The sea ice has continued to increase , but at a lesser rate of 4.37% (from last week’s growth rate of 7.83%), from the level on 12/14/2023 of 12.055 M km 2 to 12.606 M km 2 for this week. title: United States hog inventory up slightly
summary: As of Dec. 1, there were 75.0 million hogs and pigs on U.S. farms, up slightly from December 2022 and down slightly from Sept. 1, 2023, according to the Quarterly Hogs and Pigs report published today by the U.S. Department of Agriculture’s National Agricultural Statistics Service (NASS).

title: Petersburg crowns winners of 2023 Pickled Herring Contest
summary: Katy Brantuas (left) judges entries for Petersburg’s 2023 Pickled Herring Contest. (Photo by Shelby Herbert/KFSK) Petersburg locals are preserving the Northern European holiday tradition of… preserving fish in brine. The town crowned four champions this month at its 49th annual pickled herring contest. As KFSK’s Shelby Herbert reports, it was a time of merriment and cheer — with an undercurrent of fierce competition. Rain lashed the exterior of Petersburg’s Sons of Norway Hall on the night of D...

title: The Arctic This Week Take Five: Week of 18 December, 2023
summary: Take Five is The Arctic Institute's weekly redux on the Arctic's most important stories, published every Friday. The post The Arctic This Week Take Five: Week of 18 December, 2023 appeared first on The Arctic Institute - Center for Circumpolar Security Studies .
